column1: Hey Hugo, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Cancun is dope for sure! how many ppl in your group?
We are for sure 11, but later maybe they come 6 more. You can start with you he price for 11
yea thats solid! I got you. which school you all from?
We are for sure 11, but later maybe they come 6 more. You can start with you he price for 11
okay word yea NC state is lit Glenwood ave is dope
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
We already have the flights so we would like yo book the hotels ASAP
okay word I got you. what dates are the flights booked for?
Se ha reaccionado con 😂 a “okay word yea NC state is lit Glenwood ave is dope”
bet! is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
yea whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
What does it mean the * in all drinks and meals included?
Just means not the top shelf liquor at the bars on the resort
But everything else is free game
yoo whats up Hugo, how we feeling about those options so far?
Hey! I'm trying to convince my friends but lots of them say it's too expensive
Is it possible to make it cheaper the package of 4 nights in Grand Oasis?
How much were they looking to spend?
Would make sure they know that price is for the entire 4 nights, not per night, and that it's all inclusive so they don't have to spend any money on food or drinks
Yeah but we other friends paid with Funjet Vacations an all inclusive for 300 something
So they are looking for other places
Okay, for the same resort? they must have gotten it a long time ago maybe? prices have gone up recently
if you can find that same deal and screenshot it, I'll see if we can get close to it
Sorry but if you cannot make any better my friends will choose this one
yea thats a different resort though. The Oasis Palm isnt a spring break party resort
its a different resort than the Grand Oasis
We're finally going to be more than 11
I'll set up the reservation portal and send over. You can send the link to the group and each person can hop in, reserve their slot, and make their deposit
Could you make at least some discount? Or something extra free?
How many ppl total do we have as of now
Yea bro I'll hook you up with a free booze cruise ticket!
Maybe in some weeks they add some more but they don't even have the flights yet
Okay got you. We'll get the 13 started for now. If you add another room, I can add you to our ambassador program where you could earn a free stay
I'll work on this reservation portal now and send over
just emailed over the reservation. the email has a full breakdown of how to navigate through and get signed up and deposited
lmk if anyone in the group needs help
But we're trying to get to 16 because it's much cheaper than 13
yea we can add slots as we go. the people that are ready should get in asap though just in case prices go up
I can adjust to 16 open slots
the res will time out after 24 hours of inactivity so you basically have until the nighttime today
Ok, we are now 14 for sure. Could you put us 4 bedrooms of 4 and we will start doing the payments?
yup thats all ready for you!
np lmk if you need help navigating through
Could you change the room of Alberto with the one of jaime cabezas?
Hey Hugo, I will check now
Switch Alberto Garcia and Jaime Cabezas?
are people joining the last room?
when did those people plan on joining?
hey any word on Beltran, Alberto and Alfredo? They still havent got their deposits in
They have confirmed they are coming
But I don't know about their deposits
okay, if they are confirmed going we'll need them to secure their spots asap. without the deposit they dont have a spot
Jaime Nerecan included like a pack accidentally of more than 200$ and he wants to eliminate it
I've tell the 3 of them to pay asap
hey Hugo we just need Beltran and Alberto to make their deposits today so we can start getting the group processed
Alberto has paid and beltran is going to do it
What do we have to do next?
perfect! have you all added your flight info onto your accounts? that is the next step
hey Hugo, Jaime Landecho Torres and Jaime Cabezas still have a balance to pay on their account
Can we please have them pay that today so that we can get the group processed
Hello, we received a mail that it says that we need to pay extra for the open bar. In the original package the alcohol is also included no?
Hello, you don't have to pay extra for open bar on the resort. its included in your package
You may be referring to the open bar party pass which is for nightclubs off of the resort property like D'Cave, Mandala, and HOF
Thanks! We're looking forward to arriving
I saw that some of you fly back on the 21st. do you have another place you'll be staying at from the 18th to 21st?
Yes, we're moving to a house right near the hotel. We wanted to use the transfer to go over there's
okay and how about Beltran is he on the same flight as anyone else?
Bro you told me that you were going to offer something extra for organizing all my group. Finally what is it going to be?
yea I can hook you up with the 4 night party pass + booze cruise!
What is the booze cruise plan? To convince my friends
Could you explain me better the cruise plan? So I can try convince my friends
its pretty dope its a 3 hour party cruise, open bar. I'll send a video
It does not go to isla mujeres right?
No it doesnt, like it doesnt stop there for everyone to get off and go
the date is assigned to you at check in based on what days are available and how many boats there are
I've spoke with Beltran and he is in the same flights than Jaime Soares
Got it and how about Alberto García-Pardo Zuffi
Hey bro, answer whenever you can because they would have to but the flights
Hey man, I don't see another text from you
Can you see this one? I don't understand why the other one didn't appear.
I don't know why it is not working
No, but I'm going to send it as a photo to see if it works
Wow yea I'm not sure why I never received rhay
But unfort we're no longer able to make any changes to the reservation at this point. Everything is submitted to the resort. We aren't able to do any name changes or additions
Is it reeeally impossible? We would love to come but he has some personal problems

Yea man, sorry. It's too late to make any changes now that things are submitted. If he can no longer go and wants to cancel to submit a claim to Travel Insured cancellation insurance, if he has it, he can do that. Just let me know and I'll walk him through the next steps
And are there still rooms of 2?
Ok, I will talk to him
rooms are still 2 ppl per room yup
And hoy much is the price?
theres no more room availability my man
Hey bro! Thank you very much for everything. We had some amazing days.
Hugo! Glad everything worked out brother
I heard your group was awesome
